judge_result.short_rationale: Only the fresh-air step matches. It omits the required immediate actions to call 911/ambulance if not breathing and to call poison control or a doctor. It also adds ingestion-style advice (rinse mouth, do not induce vomiting, no milk/oil) that is not grounded for inhalation and is dangerous cross-incident guidance.
